metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for onboarding onto and asking questions about Java and Node.js codebases, and for modernizing a codebase by replacing a library, framework, or component.

plugins.name: ask-java-codebase
plugins.description: Answer focused questions about a Java codebase (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Micronaut, Jakarta EE, WebFlux, Lombok). Conversational, evidence-first Q&A.

plugins.name: ask-node-codebase
plugins.description: Answer focused questions about a Node.js codebase (Express, Fastify, NestJS, Hono, Next.js, tRPC, Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM, monorepos). Conversational, evidence-first Q&A.

plugins.name: onboard-java
plugins.description: Onboard a developer onto a Java codebase via a phased workflow that mines build, architecture, security, observability, CI/CD, and code quality, then produces a written report.

plugins.name: onboard-node
plugins.description: Onboard a developer onto a Node.js codebase via a phased workflow that mines build, architecture, security, observability, CI/CD, and code quality, then produces a written report.

plugins.name: modernize
plugins.description: Replaces a library, framework, or component with a new one via a 3-stage, document-driven pipeline: analyze usage (Usage Report) -> plan the replacement with an API mapping and behavior-change table (Replacement Plan) -> execute, sweep for leftover references, and verify (Replacement Report).

plugins.name: java-app-advisor
plugins.description: Critically analyzes a Java application (Spring Boot, Micronaut, Quarkus, plain Java) for architectural, design, security, performance, and technical-debt issues via a phased, evidence-first workflow, then writes a prioritized Findings Report and a Remediation Backlog with exact before/after code changes.

plugins.name: node-app-advisor
plugins.description: Critically analyzes a Node.js application (Express, Fastify, NestJS, Koa, Hono, Next.js, tRPC, plain Node; JS or TS) for architectural, design, security, performance, and technical-debt issues via a phased, evidence-first workflow, then writes a prioritized Findings Report and a Remediation Backlog with exact before/after code changes.
